metadata.name: Determine Sales Taxability of a Service

description: A consulting firm is expanding to a new state and needs to know if its services are subject to sales tax there.

nodes.task_description: Identify the specific type of consulting service being offered.

expected_outcome.value: Agent understands the nature of the service.

nodes.task_description: Research the sales tax laws of the new state regarding the taxability of services.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the state's statutes and regulations on service taxability.

nodes.task_description: Advise the client on whether they need to collect sales tax on their services in the new state.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the consulting services are not taxable in that state and advises the client.
